identity.name: ConstructMarket
identity.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Performance Pro

rules: Headings MUST be Barlow Condensed. Use uppercase for H1/H2 to mimic architectural plans.
Body text MUST be Public Sans. Ensure high legibility.
Use 'tracking-widest' for labels and overlines (e.g., 'PROJECT STATUS', 'BID ID').

accent.name: Safety Orange
accent.usage: Call to Actions (CTA), Notification Badges, Progress Bars

rules: Avoid large rounded corners. Use 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' for a sharp, industrial feel.
Use 'gap-0' combined with 'border-r border-b' for data grids to create the 'Excel/Blueprint' look.
Always add generous padding inside cards: 'p-6' or 'p-8'.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-sm h-12 px-8 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-sm font-medium uppercase text-sm h-12 px-8 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-sm uppercase text-xs tracking-wider font-bold

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.dashboard: bg-white border-r border-b border-slate-200 p-6 flex flex-col justify-between h-full

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-sm border-slate-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-slate-900 bg-white

badges.default: rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays or grid background patterns (css-doodle or svg) on large empty sections.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid colorful gradients. Use subtle linear gradients for metallic effects (e.g., slate-50 to white).
visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'Lucide React' (already installed). Stroke width 1.5px for a technical drawing feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The project already has 'Barlow Condensed' and 'Public Sans' configured in index.css. YOU MUST USE THESE.
Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. This is an industrial app. Use rounded-sm or rounded-none.
For the Marketplace Landing Page: Use a 'Tetris' Bento Grid layout. Do not stack everything vertically.
For Dashboards: Use the 'Grid Borders' style (border-r border-b on cells) to mimic spreadsheets/blueprints.
Use 'Lucide React' for icons. They are clean and technical.
When displaying prices, use large, bold Barlow Condensed font (e.g., text-3xl).
Ensure all forms (Sign Up, Create Task) use the 'Shadcn Form' component but styled with square edges.
Mobile Responsiveness: On mobile, collapse the sidebars into a Sheet (Drawer) component.
Navigation: Use a sticky header with a blur effect (backdrop-blur-md) but keep the border sharp.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this. Make it look like a high-end architectural firm's internal tool.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures/noise overlays separate good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
